deal.title: Therapeutic Massage at Sakura Spa (Up to 35% Off)
deal.description: 60-minute therapeutic massage session with choice of hot stone, deep tissue, or regular relaxation massage performed by registered massage therapist 30-minute focused massage session with choice of hot stone, deep tissue, or regular relaxation massage performed by registered massage therapist
highlights: Professional registered massage therapists on staff
Choice of hot stone, deep tissue, or relaxation massage
Perfect for stress relief and muscle tension

fine_print.cancellation_policy: Cancellation requests honored before service is provided.

deal.scheduling_recommendation: Perfect for weekday appointments 9am-5pm when availability is best
deal.photo_guidance: Professional spa interior shots showing massage rooms, hot stones, and relaxing atmosphere. Include exterior storefront shot and any certifications/credentials displayed.

intake.business_description: Sakura Spa is a professional massage therapy clinic staffed by registered massage therapists. We specialize in therapeutic massage services including hot stone massage, deep tissue massage, and relaxation massage, offering both individual sessions and value-packed service packages.
intake.services: Hot Stone Massage (60 minutes), Deep Tissue Massage (60 minutes), Regular Massage (60 minutes), Hot Stone Massage (30 minutes), Deep Tissue Massage (30 minutes), Regular Massage (30 minutes)
